description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the atomsandbits/python-meteor-test-environment:latest Docker image and defines two stages: test and deploy. Add a global before_script that runs `npm install` for all jobs. In the test stage create six jobs—test_service_database, test_service_image_generator, test_service_psi4, test_service_pyscf, test_service_tensormol, and test_service_webapp—each limited to the master branch. For the first five test jobs run `cd ./services/<service-name>`, then `npm install` and `npm test`; for test_service_tensormol add an empty before_script and run `cd ./services/tensormol` followed by `./scripts/test.sh`. In the deploy stage add a deploy_production job that also runs only on master and executes `echo "deployed!"`.
